title: Shyarn-Ado Training Schools
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Shyarn-Ado'' Training Schools}}
'''''Shyarn-Ado'' Training Schools''' were schools on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] where most [[Cerean/Legends|Cereans]] sent their young to learn how to fight with [[shyarn]] blades. The masters of this school were well publicized through demonstrations and tournaments.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-04-XX -->''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''
